description: Phase3-B25 deployed: HTTP/1.1 hold + Connection: close. Test qwen3 to verify if spinner issue is resolved. Build includes: (1) on_http_request hold for HTTP/1.1 POST, (2) on_http_request_content_data hold release, (3) Connection: keep-alive → Connection: close substitution in block response.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: SSN keyword triggers block. CRITICAL: Check if warning message or error appears instead of perpetual spinner. Previous tests (#363, #365, #366) all showed STUCK_ON_THINKING. Phase3-B25 adds HTTP/1.1 hold (prevents race condition) + Connection: close (tells browser to not expect more data).
services.notes: HTTP/1.1 service. h2_mode=2, h2_hold_request=1, h2_end_stream=1. response_type=qwen3_sse

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: CRITICAL (same as #367): v0 currently set to h2_mode=1 (GOAWAY). Test if warning/error appears. This is the GOAWAY flush hypothesis test. If warning renders, confirms keep-alive flush issue.
services.notes: h2_mode=1 (GOAWAY) — TEMPORARY for testing. Normal value is h2_mode=2.

notes: Phase3-B25 build deployed at 17:38 KST. Binary timestamp confirmed Apr 10. This test verifies two hypotheses simultaneously: (1) HTTP/1.1 hold+Connection:close fixes qwen3 spinner, (2) h2_mode=1 GOAWAY fixes v0 spinner (same as #367).
